hero.title: Safety World
hero.subtitle: The Egyptian Company for Import, Export & Supplies
hero.experience: Over 20 years supplying firefighting and land rescue equipment across Egypt.

story.label: About us
story.title: Built on decades of field experience
story.p1: We specialize in supplying firefighting and land rescue equipment and have over 20 years of experience in the field.
story.p2: Our company represents leading American and European manufacturers, providing firefighting suits and their accessories, fire hoses, nozzles, pumps, searchlights, dividing & collecting breeching, chainsaws for cutting wood, metal, and concrete, as well as firefighting foam concentrates.
story.p3: Our company also employs highly qualified technical specialists who provide professional training on the operation and maintenance of all firefighting and land rescue equipment.

capabilities.label: What we supply
capabilities.title: Complete firefighting solutions
capabilities.subtitle: American and European agency for essential land rescue equipment.

products.label: Product range
products.title: Equipment we supply
products.subtitle: A selection from our firefighting and land rescue portfolio.

reach.label: Our reach
reach.title: Trusted by Civil Protection Directorates
reach.description: Over the years we have successfully supplied a complete range of firefighting and rescue equipment to numerous Civil Protection Directorates across Egypt, with a strong commitment to quality and reliability.

training.label: Technical expertise
training.title: Training & maintenance
training.description: Our company employs highly qualified technical specialists who provide professional training on the operation and maintenance of all firefighting and land rescue equipment.

footer.legal: The Egyptian Company for Import, Export & Supplies (Safety World)
